articles.author: Barbara Ortutay, Michael Liedtke
articles.title: Elon Musk and OpenAI CEO Sam Altman head to court in high-stakes showdown over AI - AP News
articles.description: Technology tycoons Elon Musk and Sam Altman are poised to face off in a high-stakes trial revolving around the alleged betrayal, deceit and unbridled ambition that blurred the bickering billionaires’ once-shared vision for the development of artificial intell…
articles.content: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) Technology tycoons Elon Musk and Sam Altman are poised to face off in a high-stakes trial revolving around the alleged betrayal, deceit and unbridled ambition that blurred the bi… [+6215 chars]
